title: EvidencePack
description: All signal evidence available for one ticker in one cycle. Shared by the deterministic engine and the LLM reviewer.

x-changelog.0.2.0: T158 Phase 2 finalization: add evaluation_method and lane_weights fields

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump minor on additive changes, major on breaking changes.

cycle_id.description: Opaque identifier for the evaluation cycle that produced this pack.

as_of.description: Point-in-time boundary for all data in this pack (ISO 8601).

generated_at.description: Wall-clock time at which this pack was built (ISO 8601).

evaluation_method.description: Which evaluation path produced this pack. Absent or 'deterministic' means the deterministic engine only.

lane_weights.description: Per-lane weight used when a combination signal generated the evidence scores. Keys are lane names; values are non-negative floats summing to 1.0.

actionable_signals.description: Signal results that passed all freshness, source-count, and corroboration gates.

context_signals.description: Signal results that are informational only (inferred lanes, insufficient corroboration).

suppressed_signals.description: Signal results blocked by freshness or data-quality gates.

data_quality.description: Aggregate data-quality metrics for this pack.

source_count.description: Number of distinct data sources contributing actionable signals.

confirmed_signal_count.description: Count of signals with verification_level == CONFIRMED.

inferred_signal_count.description: Count of signals with verification_level == INFERRED.

blockers.description: Human-readable reasons why some signals were suppressed.
